note: F review run-init: post-impl 5-iter for 010/004 commit c0ec765f4
No correctness findings: dispatch, adapter vec-table writes, and legacy fallback match scoped contracts.
Adapter-unavailable refresh path returns failed=0/skipped=0 with only a warning, so scan consumers can miss an all-row embedding outage.
Found one P1: active embedder name/dim mismatch is handled as per-row EMBEDDING-FAILED and deletes vec rows instead of failing configuration early.
ADAPTER-UNAVAILABLE is returned in warnings[] but not emitted via console.warn, unlike other refresh failures.
No new architecture-fit findings; module boundaries and active vec write/read shape align.
